title: Hub signal boomerang suppression: dedup + source_spoke check at wakeup Step 5
summary: Signals returning to their originator via hub inbox were being re-incorporated as duplicate local lugs. Fix: two-layer suppression in wakeup Step 5 Hub Signal Bulletin — ID dedup + source_spoke boomerang check. source_spoke now required on signal lugs.
pattern: Step 5: for each hub inbox signal — check ID in local bytype/signal/ → skip if found; check source_spoke contains wheel.name → skip if match; else incorporate.
